stories.title: Backend: ExecutionEventBus with pub/sub
stories.verification: python3 -c import works; ExecutionEvent dataclass, subscribe(), publish(), all constants verified

stories.title: Backend: WebSocket endpoint at /api/executions/live
stories.verification: api.py routes added; APIHandler.__init__ accepts event_bus; WebSocket handler implemented; py_compile passes

stories.title: Scanner: emit events at each execution step
stories.verification: set_event_bus() added; all 8 event types emitted with asyncio.create_task(); no logger.info removed; py_compile passes

stories.title: main.py: wire event_bus into Scanner and APIHandler
stories.verification: ExecutionEventBus imported; event_bus created; scanner.set_event_bus() called; start_api_server() passes event_bus; py_compile passes

stories.title: Frontend: useExecutionFeed WebSocket hook
stories.verification: File created; npx tsc --noEmit shows no errors in project files

stories.title: Frontend: ExecutionFeed transcript component
stories.verification: File created; npx tsc --noEmit shows no errors; color coding, auto-scroll, connection dot all implemented

stories.title: AuditPage: integrate ExecutionFeed
stories.verification: Import added; ExecutionFeed rendered before AuditFilterBar; npx tsc --noEmit passes

stories.title: Integration verification
stories.verification: All code verified: scanner emits events, WS endpoint wired, event_bus shared; backend needs restart for live testing; frontend running on 5173 with ExecutionFeed integrated
